title: artemisia stricta var. diffusa
intro: Artemisia stricta var. diffusa, also known as sagebrush or prairie sagewort, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter, aromatic leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Artemisia stricta var. diffusa include its potential to support the immune system, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
